metadata.description: Name of the Microsoft Sentinel (Log Analytics) workspace.

workbookDisplayName.defaultValue: Defender XDR Admin Role Change Monitoring

metadata.description: Display name for the Sentinel workbook.
High-risk roles included in the normalization function risk scoring.

variables.normalizedFunctionQuery: [concat('let highRiskRoles = dynamic(', string(parameters('highRiskRoles')), '); let entraRoleChanges = AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | where Category == "RoleManagement" | extend InitiatedByUpn = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), InitiatedByApp = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName), ActorDisplay = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.displayName), ActorIp = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress) | mv-apply tr = TargetResources on ( summarize RoleName = anyif(tostring(tr.displayName), tostring(tr.type) == "Role"), TargetUpn = anyif(tostring(tr.userPrincipalName), tostring(tr.type) == "User" and isnotempty(tostring(tr.userPrincipalName))), TargetName = anyif(tostring(tr.displayName), tostring(tr.type) == "User") ) | project TimeGenerated, SourceTable = "AuditLogs", Provider = "EntraID", Operation = OperationName, Actor = coalesce(ActorDisplay, InitiatedByUpn, InitiatedByApp, "Unknown"), ActorUPN = coalesce(InitiatedByUpn, InitiatedByApp, ""), ActorIp, TargetIdentity = coalesce(TargetUpn, TargetName, ""), RoleName = coalesce(RoleName, ""), Result = tostring(Result), AADOperationType = tostring(AADOperationType), CorrelationId = tostring(CorrelationId), AdditionalData = tostring(TargetResources); let permissionGrants = CloudAppEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | where Application == "Microsoft 365" and ActionType has "delegated permission grant" | extend ActorArr = todynamic(RawEventData).Actor | mv-apply a = ActorArr on ( summarize ActorUpnX = anyif(tostring(a.ID), toint(a.Type) == 5) ) | project TimeGenerated, SourceTable = "CloudAppEvents", Provider = "M365Defender", Operation = ActionType, Actor = coalesce(AccountDisplayName, ActorUpnX, ""), ActorUPN = coalesce(ActorUpnX, tostring(AccountObjectId), ""), ActorIp = tostring(IPAddress), TargetIdentity = tostring(ObjectName), RoleName = "Delegated permission grant", Result = "success", AADOperationType = tostring(ActionType), CorrelationId = tostring(todynamic(RawEventData).Id), AdditionalData = tostring(RawEventData); let urbacRoleChanges = CloudAppEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback) | where ActionType in ("CreateRole", "UpdateRole", "DeleteRole", "CreateAssignment", "UpdateAssignment", "DeleteAssignment") | where tostring(RawEventData.Workload) == "URBAC" | project TimeGenerated, SourceTable = "CloudAppEvents", Provider = "DefenderXDR", Operation = ActionType, Actor = coalesce(AccountDisplayName, tostring(RawEventData.UserId), ""), ActorUPN = tostring(RawEventData.UserId), ActorIp = tostring(RawEventData.ClientIP), TargetIdentity = coalesce(tostring(RawEventData.RoleAssignmentId), tostring(RawEventData.RoleDefinitionId), ""), RoleName = strcat("URBAC role ", tostring(RawEventData.RoleDefinitionId)), Result = "success", AADOperationType = ActionType, CorrelationId = tostring(RawEventData.Id), AdditionalData = tostring(RawEventData); union isfuzzy=true entraRoleChanges, permissionGrants, urbacRoleChanges | extend RoleName = iff(isempty(RoleName), "Unknown", RoleName) | extend RiskLevel = case(RoleName has_any (highRiskRoles), "High", Provider == "DefenderXDR" and Operation in ("CreateRole", "UpdateRole", "CreateAssignment", "UpdateAssignment"), "High", "Normal") | order by TimeGenerated desc')]
variables.highRiskFunctionQuery: [concat('let approvedAdmins = _GetWatchlist("', variables('watchlistApprovedAdminsAlias'), '") | project ApprovedAdmin = tolower(trim(" ", tostring(SearchKey))); fxdr_role_changes_normalized(lookback) | extend ActorUPNNormalized = tolower(trim(" ", tostring(ActorUPN))) | where RiskLevel == "High" | where Operation !has "expired" | join kind=leftouter approvedAdmins on $left.ActorUPNNormalized == $right.ApprovedAdmin | extend IsApprovedActor = iif(isnotempty(ApprovedAdmin), true, false) | where IsApprovedActor == false | project TimeGenerated, Provider, Operation, Actor, ActorUPN, TargetIdentity, RoleName, RiskLevel, Result, CorrelationId, AdditionalData')]
variables.baselineFunctionQuery: fxdr_role_changes_normalized(lookback) | summarize TotalRoleChanges=count(), DistinctTargets=dcount(TargetIdentity), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by Actor, ActorUPN, Provider | order by TotalRoleChanges desc
variables.workbookSerializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Defender XDR Admin Role Change Monitoring

Tracks admin role changes across three sources: Entra directory roles (RoleManagement), Microsoft 365 delegated permission grants, and Defender XDR Unified RBAC (URBAC) custom roles/assignments. Highlights high-risk, permanent (non-PIM), and external/guest activity."},"name":"text-intro"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"f1e2d3c4-b5a6-4790-8123-000000000001","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","label":"Time range","type":2,"isRequired":true,"typeSettings":{"additionalResourceOptions":[]},"jsonData":"[{"value":"1d","label":"Last 1 day"},{"value":"7d","label":"Last 7 days","selected":true},{"value":"15d","label":"Last 15 days"},{"value":"30d","label":"Last 30 days"},{"value":"60d","label":"Last 60 days"},{"value":"90d","label":"Last 90 days"}]"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0},"name":"parameters-timerange"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let d = fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange});
union
 (d | summarize Value=count() | extend Name="Total changes", o=1),
 (d | summarize Value=countif(RiskLevel == "High") | extend Name="High-risk", o=2),
 (d | summarize Value=countif(Operation contains "outside of PIM") | extend Name="Permanent (non-PIM)", o=3),
 (d | summarize Value=countif(ActorUPN contains "#EXT#" or TargetIdentity contains "#EXT#") | extend Name="External / guest", o=4),
 (d | summarize Value=countif(Provider == "DefenderXDR") | extend Name="URBAC role ops", o=5)
| order by o asc
| project Name, Value","size":3,"title":"Key indicators — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"Name","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Value","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"auto"}},"showBorder":true}},"name":"kpi-tiles"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| summarize Changes=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), RiskLevel
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Role changes over time — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart"},"name":"trend-timechart"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| summarize TotalChanges=count(), HighRiskChanges=countif(RiskLevel == "High"), DistinctActors=dcount(ActorUPN), DistinctTargets=dcount(TargetIdentity) by Provider
| order by HighRiskChanges desc","size":0,"title":"Role Change Summary — Last {TimeRange} (select a row to see the changes)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","exportFieldName":"Provider","exportParameterName":"SelectedProvider","exportDefaultValue":""},"name":"summary-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where "{SelectedProvider}" == "" or Provider == "{SelectedProvider}"
| project TimeGenerated, Provider, Operation, RoleName, Actor, ActorUPN, TargetIdentity, RiskLevel, Result
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Role Change Details — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"detail-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| summarize Changes=count() by Actor
| top 10 by Changes desc","size":1,"title":"Top actors — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"top-actors"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where RoleName != "Unknown"
| summarize Changes=count() by RoleName
| top 10 by Changes desc","size":1,"title":"Top roles — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"top-roles"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| summarize Changes=count() by Operation
| top 15 by Changes desc","size":1,"title":"Operations breakdown — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"operations-breakdown"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where ActorUPN contains "#EXT#" or TargetIdentity contains "#EXT#"
| project TimeGenerated, Provider, Operation, RoleName, Actor, ActorUPN, TargetIdentity, RiskLevel
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"External / guest accounts in role changes — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"external-guest-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where Operation contains "outside of PIM"
| project TimeGenerated, Provider, Operation, RoleName, Actor, ActorUPN, TargetIdentity, RiskLevel
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Permanent (non-PIM) privileged grants — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"permanent-nonpim-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where Provider == "DefenderXDR"
| extend RoleDefId = tostring(todynamic(AdditionalData).RoleDefinitionId)
| extend Permissions = todynamic(AdditionalData).AddedRolePermission
| join kind=leftouter (_GetWatchlist("urbac-role-names") | project WLId=tostring(column_ifexists("RoleDefinitionId", "")), WLName=tostring(column_ifexists("RoleName", ""))) on $left.RoleDefId == $right.WLId
| extend RoleName = coalesce(WLName, strcat("URBAC role ", RoleDefId))
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, Actor, ActorUPN, ActorIp, RoleName, RoleDefId, TargetIdentity, Permissions
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Defender XDR Unified RBAC (URBAC) changes — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"urbac-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where isnotempty(ActorIp)
| summarize Changes=count(), DistinctActors=dcount(ActorUPN), Roles=make_set(RoleName, 8), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by ActorIp
| order by Changes desc","size":0,"title":"Role changes by source IP — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"source-ip-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let actors = fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange}) | where isnotempty(ActorUPN) | distinct AUPN=tolower(ActorUPN);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
| where tolower(UserPrincipalName) in (actors)
| summarize SignIns=count(), MFAUsed=countif(AuthenticationRequirement == "multiFactorAuthentication"), SingleFactor=countif(AuthenticationRequirement == "singleFactorAuthentication"), RiskySignIns=countif(RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("high", "medium", "low")), AtRisk=countif(RiskState == "atRisk"), LastSignIn=max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName
| order by RiskySignIns desc, SingleFactor desc","size":0,"title":"Sign-in posture of role-change actors (MFA / risk) — Last {TimeRange}","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"signin-posture-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_changes_high_risk({TimeRange})
| project TimeGenerated, Provider, Operation, RoleName, Actor, ActorUPN, TargetIdentity, Result
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"High-Risk Role Changes by Unapproved Actors","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"high-risk-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"fxdr_role_change_actor_baseline({TimeRange})
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Actor Baseline","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"baseline-grid"}],"isLocked":false,"fallbackResourceIds":["Azure Monitor"]}

properties.description: Approved identities allowed to perform privileged Defender XDR admin role assignments.
properties.rawContent:
Admin,DisplayName,Notes
admin1@contoso.com,Defender Security Admin,Example approved privileged actor

properties.description: Approved maintenance window used for Defender XDR role change governance.
properties.rawContent:
Window,WindowStartUtc,WindowEndUtc,Notes
default,02:00,04:00,Approved daily maintenance window in UTC

properties.description: Maps Defender XDR Unified RBAC RoleDefinitionId GUIDs to friendly role names (not present in the audit log).
properties.rawContent:
RoleDefinitionId,RoleName,Notes
00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000,Example URBAC role,Replace with your RoleDefinitionId to friendly-name mapping

properties.description: Sentinel workbook for Defender XDR admin role change monitoring.

properties.displayName: Defender XDR High-Risk Role Assignment by Unapproved Actor
properties.description: Detects high-risk Defender XDR or Entra role changes made by actors not in the approved admin watchlist.

properties.displayName: Defender XDR Role Assignment Outside Approved Maintenance Window
properties.description: Detects Defender XDR role assignments that happen outside the approved maintenance window watchlist.
properties.query: [concat('let win = _GetWatchlist("', variables('watchlistMaintenanceAlias'), '") | where SearchKey == "default" | take 1; let StartMin = toscalar(win | extend p = split(tostring(column_ifexists("WindowStartUtc", "02:00")), ":") | project toint(p[0]) * 60 + toint(p[1])); let EndMin = toscalar(win | extend p = split(tostring(column_ifexists("WindowEndUtc", "04:00")), ":") | project toint(p[0]) * 60 + toint(p[1])); fxdr_role_changes_normalized() | extend MinOfDay = hourofday(TimeGenerated) * 60 + datetime_part("minute", TimeGenerated) | where MinOfDay < StartMin or MinOfDay > EndMin')]
